title: 🔥偏离拟合价53%，极致压缩待变盘
body: 市场正处于“价值回归”的深水区。BTC 价格 $69,052 横盘，AHR999 跌至 0.35 抄底区并非偶然，核心在于价格偏离拟合价格 $149,598 高达 -53.8%，估值泡沫已被极度挤干。更关键的是，价格偏离 200日成本 $91,763 达 -24.7%，意味着长期筹码普遍承压。既然价格大幅低于平均成本，且 MVRV 仅 1.31 低于历史 72% 时间，说明全网盈利空间已被大幅压缩，抛压动能减弱。因此，当前并非顶部派发，而是底部筹码交换的残酷阶段。外部摩根大通指出 Bitcoin 较金银更具韧性，宏观资金流相对稳定；但 Aave 削减回购预算至 $3000 万或削弱 DeFi 板块通缩叙事。结论：中性筑底。当价格低于成本线 24%，你选择止损离场还是静待均值回归？
title_en: 🔥 Off by 53% from Fit Price, Extreme Compression Awaits Turnaround
body_en: The market is deep in the "value return" zone. BTC price is hovering at $69,052, and AHR999 dipping to the 0.35 bottoming area is not a coincidence. The core lies in the price being off the fit price of $149,598 by a massive -53.8%, with the valuation bubble having been squeezed to the extreme. More importantly, the price deviation from the 200-day cost of $91,763 is -24.7%, indicating that long-term holdings are widely under pressure. Since the price is significantly below the average cost, and MVRV is only 1.31 below the historical 72% time, it shows that the overall profit space has been greatly compressed, and the selling momentum has weakened. Therefore, this is not a top distribution phase, but a残酷 bottoming stage of筹码 exchange. External JPMorgan Chase points out that Bitcoin is more resilient than gold and silver, with macro capital flows relatively stable; but Aave cutting the repurchase budget to $30 million may weaken the deflation narrative of the DeFi sector. Conclusion: Neutral bottoming. When the price is 24% below the cost line, do you choose to cut losses and exit or wait for mean reversion?
